description_long: This vase features a bulbous body crafted from a dark green marble-like material with intricate white veining, giving it a luxurious and sophisticated appearance. The neck is tall and cylindrical, topped with a metallic gold rim that matches the three elegantly curved gold legs supporting the vase. Each leg is stylized and angular, providing both stability and a modern, sculptural aesthetic. A prominent gold crescent moon embellishment is attached to the body, adding a unique decorative accent. The surface is highly polished, reflecting light and enhancing the contrast between the marble and metallic elements. The overall design blends classical materials with contemporary form, making it a striking decorative piece.
description: A dark green marble-patterned vase with a tall neck, gold rim, crescent moon accent, and three sculptural gold legs. The surface is glossy and highly reflective, combining luxury with modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold crescent moon accent and all three gold legs clearly, with the marble veining most visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the curvature of the legs and the gold rim, with the crescent moon partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: The crescent moon is fully visible on the right side, and the marble pattern is prominent across the body.
description_view_3: The back view shows the marble surface uninterrupted, with the gold legs and rim visible but no decorative accent in focus.
